name: Fixtures / Mounts / Accessories > Bathroom > Grab Bars / Safety Bars
taxonomy_path: Labor > Fixtures / Mounts / Accessories > Bathroom > Grab Bars / Safety Bars
basis: Locate stud/blocking, screw into stud or heavy toggle anchors, level and secure. Tile mounting adds time; avg case 45 min. ADA bar ~$30.
sources: Homewyse install grab bars $158-$398/bar (incl matl); HomeGuide $100-$350/bar; Angi 2026. Task-only labor ~$100-150 solo pro locating blocking or heavy anchors.

name: Fixtures / Mounts / Accessories > Bathroom > Mirror
taxonomy_path: Labor > Fixtures / Mounts / Accessories > Bathroom > Mirror
basis: Hang framed or frameless mirror: mark, level, set cleat or J-clips, anchor to studs/drywall. Clips/adhesive ~$15. Large mirrors trend high.
sources: HomeGuide/Thumbtack mirror hang $100-$200; frameless/heavy mirror uses cleats+anchors. Task-only labor ~$90-130.

name: Fixtures / Mounts / Accessories > Bathroom > Shower Curtain Rod (Permanent)
taxonomy_path: Labor > Fixtures / Mounts / Accessories > Bathroom > Shower Curtain Rod (Permanent)
basis: Fixed-mount rod: mark height/level, drill flanges into tile or stud, anchor both ends. Anchors/hardware ~$20. Excludes tension rods.
sources: HomeGuide/Thumbtack small-fixture install $75-$125; permanent screwed rod anchors into tile/stud. Task-only ~$75-100.

name: Fixtures / Mounts / Accessories > Bathroom > TP Holder
taxonomy_path: Labor > Fixtures / Mounts / Accessories > Bathroom > TP Holder
basis: Mount TP holder: mark, level, 2-4 screws with anchors into drywall or tile. Anchors ~$12. Fast repeat-unit fixture.
sources: Thumbtack/HomeGuide bath accessory install $50-$100 each; small anchored fixture. Task-only ~$55-75.

name: Fixtures / Mounts / Accessories > Bathroom > Towel Bar
taxonomy_path: Labor > Fixtures / Mounts / Accessories > Bathroom > Towel Bar
basis: Mount towel bar: level across two brackets, drill/anchor into drywall or tile, set posts. Hardware ~$12. Repeat-unit fixture.
sources: Thumbtack/HomeGuide bath accessory install $50-$100; two brackets need leveling. Task-only ~$55-80.

name: Fixtures / Mounts / Accessories > Bathroom > Towel Hook
taxonomy_path: Labor > Fixtures / Mounts / Accessories > Bathroom > Towel Hook
basis: Mount towel hook: mark, 1-2 screws with anchor into drywall or tile. Anchors ~$8. Fastest repeat-unit fixture.
sources: Thumbtack/HomeGuide small-fixture install $40-$90; single-point hook quickest bath accessory. Task-only ~$45-65.

name: Fixtures / Mounts / Accessories > Bathroom > Towel Ring
taxonomy_path: Labor > Fixtures / Mounts / Accessories > Bathroom > Towel Ring
basis: Mount towel ring: mark, level, 2 screws with anchors into drywall or tile. Anchors ~$10. Repeat-unit fixture.
sources: Thumbtack/HomeGuide bath accessory install $50-$100; single bracket, similar to TP holder. Task-only ~$50-70.

name: Fixtures / Mounts / Accessories > General > Install / Hang Miscellaneous
taxonomy_path: Labor > Fixtures / Mounts / Accessories > General > Install / Hang Miscellaneous
basis: Catch-all light hang/mount of a customer item: locate stud/anchor, level, secure. Hardware ~$12. Confirm item/weight on site.
sources: Handyman general hang/mount $75-$150; scope varies widely. Task-only ~$75-100 default.

name: Fixtures / Mounts / Accessories > General > Install / Hang Picture Frames
taxonomy_path: Labor > Fixtures / Mounts / Accessories > General > Install / Hang Picture Frames
basis: Hang framed art: locate stud or set anchor for weight, level, secure hanger. Hardware ~$8. Per-each; galleries scale by count.
sources: HomeGuide/Thumbtack picture/art hanging $50-$100 first piece; galleries per additional. Task-only ~$50-75.

name: Fixtures / Mounts / Accessories > General > Install / Replace AC Register
taxonomy_path: Labor > Fixtures / Mounts / Accessories > General > Install / Replace AC Register
basis: Replace supply register/grille: remove old, verify size, screw new grille to boot. Register ~$15. Cosmetic swap, handyman-legal (not duct work).
sources: Handyman small-vent swap $45-$90; register is a screw-in grille, no ductwork. Task-only ~$45-65.

name: Fixtures / Mounts / Accessories > General > Install / Replace Closet Rod
taxonomy_path: Labor > Fixtures / Mounts / Accessories > General > Install / Replace Closet Rod
basis: Install closet rod: measure, level, anchor brackets to studs, set rod (center support if long). Rod+brackets ~$20. Repeat-unit friendly.
sources: HomeGuide/Thumbtack closet rod install $60-$125; end brackets plus mid support on long spans. Task-only ~$60-90.

name: Fixtures / Mounts / Accessories > General > Install Floating Shelves
taxonomy_path: Labor > Fixtures / Mounts / Accessories > General > Install Floating Shelves
basis: Install floating shelf: locate studs, level hidden bracket/cleat, anchor, seat shelf. Bracket hardware ~$25 (shelf often customer-supplied). Added shelves cheaper.
sources: CountBricks floating shelf install $95-$260/shelf; finish carpenter labor $85-$120/shelf; Homewyse shelving $21.67-$33.48/lf. Task-only labor ~$90-130 first shelf.

name: Fixtures / Mounts / Accessories > General > Install Replace Register Return
taxonomy_path: Labor > Fixtures / Mounts / Accessories > General > Install Replace Register Return
basis: Replace return-air grille: remove old, confirm size, mount new (often larger, filter slot). Grille ~$25. Cosmetic cover swap, handyman-legal (no duct work).
sources: Handyman grille swap $50-$100; return-air grille larger than supply register but still a screw-in cover. Task-only ~$50-75.

name: Fixtures / Mounts / Accessories > General > Install Standard Shelving
taxonomy_path: Labor > Fixtures / Mounts / Accessories > General > Install Standard Shelving
basis: Install bracket or track-and-standard shelving: locate studs, level standards, anchor, set shelves. Hardware ~$30. Scales with linear feet.
sources: Homewyse install shelving $21.67-$33.48/lf; handyman shelf job $100-$400 typical. Task-only labor ~$100-150 for a bracket/track run.

name: Fixtures / Mounts / Accessories > General > Install TV Mount
taxonomy_path: Labor > Fixtures / Mounts / Accessories > General > Install TV Mount
basis: Mount TV: locate studs, level bracket, lag into studs, hang set, dress cables externally. Mount hardware ~$25 (mount often customer-supplied). In-wall concealment adds scope.
sources: homeyou Melbourne FL TV mounting avg $256-$343 all-in; labor-only $150-$250; Melbourne installers from $150. Task-only Melbourne ~$150-200 (no cord concealment).

name: Fixtures / Mounts / Accessories > Kitchen > Paper Towel holder
taxonomy_path: Labor > Fixtures / Mounts / Accessories > Kitchen > Paper Towel holder
basis: Mount kitchen paper towel holder: mark, level, 2 screws with anchors into drywall/backsplash or cabinet. Anchors ~$8. Fast repeat-unit fixture.
sources: Handyman small-fixture install $40-$90; wall-mount paper towel holder is a 2-screw mount. Task-only ~$45-65.

name: Fixtures / Mounts / Accessories > Kitchen > Pot Rack
taxonomy_path: Labor > Fixtures / Mounts / Accessories > Kitchen > Pot Rack
basis: Install pot rack: locate joists/studs, lay out, lag heavy mounts to framing for hanging load, level. Heavy hardware ~$20. Ceiling-mount racks trend high.
sources: HomeGuide/Thumbtack pot rack / heavy hanging install $100-$200; wall or ceiling mount must hit joists for load. Task-only ~$100-150.
